script:
export const meta = { name: 'camiel-roadmap-build', description: 'Implement alpha-v0.0.2 and alpha-v0.0.3 for Project-Camiel Godot game', phases: [{ title: 'Implement' }, { title: 'Docs' }] };

const P = '/Volumes/T9/Code/projects/Project-Camiel';

phase('Implement');

const result = await agent('Implement the complete Project-Camiel roadmap at ' + P + ' (Godot 4 GDScript game). Read docs/roadmap.md, scripts/intro_scene.gd, scripts/camiel_controller.gd, scenes/main.tscn, project.godot, export_presets.cfg first. Then implement ALL of the following and return FULL contents of every file created or modified:

1. ALPHA v0.0.2:
- scripts/main_menu.gd + scenes/main_menu.tscn: Node2D with large "Start!" Button (keyboard Enter), loads main.tscn
- scripts/audio_manager.gd: Autoload singleton with play_music/stop_music/play_sfx methods, Master+SFX buses, placeholder audio paths
- assets/audio/README.md listing required bgm_ambient.ogg sfx_collect.ogg sfx_finish.ogg
- scripts/collectible.gd + scenes/collectible.tscn: Area2D star, collected signal, hides on Camiel touch, calls AudioManager.play_sfx
- Add collectible instance to main.tscn
- scripts/hud.gd + update main.tscn: Label top-left "Stars: 0" updates on collectible.collected
- scripts/finish_marker.gd + scenes/finish_marker.tscn: Area2D flag, _on_body_entered shows "Goed zo!" label, plays finish sfx, after 2s shows "Press Enter to play again"
- Add finish_marker to main.tscn

2. ALPHA v0.0.3:
- scripts/red_block.gd + scenes/red_block.tscn: red Area2D, turns green + chime on Camiel touch
- scripts/blue_target.gd + scenes/blue_target.tscn: blue Area2D slightly camouflaged, success on touch
- scripts/count_challenge.gd + scenes/count_challenge.tscn: 3 collectibles, Label "Count: 0", shows "3! Goed zo!" at 3
- scenes/lesson_1.tscn: Node2D containing red_block blue_target and count_challenge
- Update main_menu.tscn: add "Lesson" button
- docs/parent-teacher-notes.md: comprehensive educator guide
- docs/accessibility-report.md: WCAG AA audit + fixes applied in code
- scripts/accessibility.gd: Autoload with toggle_high_contrast

3. TECH DEBT:
- .github/workflows/export.yml: Godot CI with export-release step, quality gate, artifact upload
- docs/code-signing.md: cert docs, signtool command, GitHub secrets setup
- docs/build-and-release.md: updated with CI pipeline steps
- scripts/title_screen.gd + scenes/title_screen.tscn: branded title with Camiel idle, Play button, version label
- scripts/ui/version_label.gd + scenes/ui/version_label.tscn: reusable version label (extends Label, sets text in _ready)
- Add version_label to main_menu main.tscn lesson_1 title_screen

4. FINAL:
- Update docs/roadmap.md: mark v0.0.2+v0.0.3 done with date 2026-06-05
- Create/update CHANGELOG.md with all changes
- Git add all new files
- Print organized file manifest

Return ALL file contents.', { label: 'implement-all', tier: 'medium', cwd: P });

phase('Docs');

return { ok: true, result: result };

agents.label: implement-all
agents.prompt:

logs: agent implement-all failed: Agent "implement-all" timed out after 600000ms
